samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>A 3-light traffic light system with a pedestrian button.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Request signal for pedestrians.</input>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">Current count value of the internal counter.</output>
        <output id="red">Red light control signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow light control signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green light control signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state_value id="idle">State representing the initial condition.</state_value>
        <state_value id="s1_red">State representing the 'red' phase.</state_value>
        <state_value id="s2_yellow">State representing the 'yellow' phase.</state_value>
        <state_value id="s3_green">State representing the 'green' phase.</state_value>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter for managing timing.</reg>
        <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state of the traffic light system.</reg>
        <reg id="p_red">Previous value of the red signal.</reg>
        <reg id="p_yellow">Previous value of the yellow signal.</reg>
        <reg id="p_green">Previous value of the green signal.</reg>
        
        <!-- State transition logic -->
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= idle;
            end else begin
                case(state)
                    idle: state <= s1_red;
                    s1_red: if(cnt == 3'd3) state <= s3_green; else state <= s1_red;
                    s2_yellow: if(cnt == 3'd3) state <= s1_red; else state <= s2_yellow;
                    s3_green: if(cnt == 3'd3) state <= s2_yellow; else state <= s3_green;
                    default: state <= idle;
                endcase
            end
        </always>
        
        <!-- Counting logic -->
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)> // or posedge clk
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else if(pass_request && green) begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else if(!green && p_green) begin
                cnt <= 8'd60;
            end else if(!yellow && p_yellow) begin
                cnt <= 8'd5;
            end else if(!red && p_red) begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else begin
                cnt <= cnt - 8'd1;
            end
        end
        
        // Output assignment
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                {p_red, p_yellow, p_green} <= 3'b000;
            end else begin
                {p_red, p_yellow, p_green} <= {red, yellow, green};
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>Described above.</implementation>
    
</module>
